overview: Necrodominance Combo is a Legacy U/B/G deck that leverages fast artifact mana to accelerate into Beseech the Mirror. By copying key permanents early, the deck generates overwhelming value, infinite mana, or direct win conditions before opponents can stabilize. Success relies on precise sequencing and protecting the combo engine from disruption.
win_conditions: Copying a mana-producing artifact with Beseech the Mirror to generate infinite mana
Using Beseech the Mirror on a creature to trigger multiple combat damage or ability resolutions
Accelerating into a game-ending spell via Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two mana sources (Chrome Mox, Lotus Petal, or lands)
Hands containing Beseech the Mirror plus acceleration
Hands with a clear path to turn two or three combo execution
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking artifact lands or mox/lotus synergy
Hands with only slow ramp or no combo pieces
Hands missing color fixing for U/B/G spells

early_game: Prioritize playing Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal to enable early Beseech the Mirror
Play lands and hold up colors for U/B/G spells
Avoid unnecessary combat to preserve combo pieces
mid_game: Execute Beseech the Mirror on a key permanent to generate value or mana
Use copied permanents to cast game-ending spells or stabilize
Apply pressure if combo is disrupted to buy time
late_game: Reassemble combo pieces using draw spells or recursion
Leverage multiple artifact permanents for repeated Beseech the Mirror copies
Close out the game with overwhelming resource advantage

key_cards.name: Chrome Mox
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to enable early Beseech the Mirror or color fixing for U/B/G spells

key_cards.name: Lotus Petal
key_cards.notes: Provides early mana to cast Beseech the Mirror or other combo enablers ahead of schedule

key_cards.name: Beseech the Mirror
key_cards.notes: Copy a key artifact or creature to generate infinite mana, trigger multiple abilities, or resolve a game-ending effect

sequencing_tips: Always play Chrome Mox before Lotus Petal to maximize color fixing early
Hold up mana for Beseech the Mirror before committing to other spells
Prioritize copying permanents that generate mana or card advantage first

matchups.advice: Prioritize speed and use artifact lands to block early threats
watch_for: Board wipes that clear your combo setup

matchups.advice: Play around counterspells and prioritize going first
Race for board presence and disrupt their setup with interaction
